betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Presser§f

§aExtract honey, beeswax, cooking oil, and tofu through mechanical pressing!§f

The §bPresser§f is a multi-purpose extraction block used in many HarvestCraft production chains. It mechanically compresses raw ingredients into processed outputs.

§6Crafting§f: §e5× Iron Ingots§f + §e2× Iron Blocks§f + §e1× Piston§f.

§6Recipes§f:
§b• Honeycomb§f → §e2× Honey§f + Grain Bait.
§b• Waxcomb§f → §e2× Beeswax§f + Grain Bait.
§b• Soybean§f → §e2× Silken Tofu§f.
§b• Sugar Cane§f → §bSugar§f.
§b• Seeds/Nuts§f → §bCooking Oil§f.
§b• Fresh Water§f → §bBubbly Water§f (for sodas).

§6Usage§f:
§9Right-click§f to open the GUI. Place the source ingredient in the input slot and the presser automatically processes it into the corresponding output. The presser works without external power — only player interaction or item routing is required.

§6Automation§f:
The Presser is fully automatable. Items can be piped in from above via §bhoppers§f, §bitemducts§f, or §bdrawers§f, and outputs can be extracted the same way. Pair with an §bApiary§f for honey/beeswax automation and a §bCrop Farm§f for cooking oil production.

§eTip§f: Build a Presser early — it unlocks Tofu (high-protein food) and Cooking Oil (used in many skillet recipes) without needing a more complex machine.
